sql: INSERT INTO dphu (user_id, prefix, prenom, deuxiemenom, nomfamille, sexe, birth_month, birth_day, birth_year, adresse, ville, province, postal, pays, email, telephone) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE dphu SET orgName = ?, position = ?, orgTel = ?, orgEmail = ?, orgStreet = ?, orgApt = ?, orgCity = ?, orgState = ?, orgZip = ?, orgCountry = ? WHERE user_id = ?

UPDATE dphu SET school1_name = ?, school1_field = ?, school1_degree = ?, school1_from_month = ?, school1_from_day = ?, school1_from_year = ?, school1_to_month = ?, school1_to_day = ?, school1_to_year = ?, school2_name = ?, school2_field = ?, school2_degree = ?, school2_from_month = ?, school2_from_day = ?, school2_from_year = ?, school2_to_month = ?, school2_to_day = ?, school2_to_year = ?, school3_name = ?, school3_field = ?, school3_degree = ?, school3_from_month = ?, school3_from_day = ?, school3_from_year = ?, school3_to_month = ?, school3_to_day = ?, school3_to_year = ? WHERE user_id = ?
UPDATE dphu SET study_degree = ?, study_course = ?, study_field = ?, study_specialty = ?, study_language = ?, english_proficiency = ?, study_additional_info = ? WHERE user_id = ?
UPDATE dphu SET photo = ?, passport = ?, degree_certificate = ?, academic_transcript = ?, language_proof = ?, recommendation_letters = ?, other_documents = ? WHERE user_id = ?
